text.title: Decomposition: Django Monolith to Bounded Apps Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the decomposition-django methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: scan-imports
step.action: Run pydeps + git grep for cross-app imports; rank by edge weight.

step.name: draft-boundary-map
step.action: Cluster apps into proposed boundaries respecting ownership; identify forbidden edges.
step.decision-gate: If two teams own one app, split first.

step.name: write-import-contract
step.action: Translate to importlinter.ini; commit; run lint-imports.
step.decision-gate: If contract fails on current code, refactor leak sites or amend the boundary.

step.name: plan-model-moves
step.action: List models that must move; order by FK dependencies.

step.name: execute-move
step.action: Single PR: new app file, RunPython for FK rewrites + ContentType update, delete old reference.

step.name: verify
step.action: Re-run pydeps + import-linter; confirm no new forbidden edges.
